bankAccount.listSubtitle: Track monthly balances across your household's bank accounts.
bankAccount.emptyBody: Create your first bank account to start tracking month-end balances.
bankAccount.deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
bankAccount.deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
bankAccount.createDescription: Track a bank account in your household. You'll record monthly balance snapshots from your bank statements afterwards.
bankAccount.editDescription: Update the account's display name, bank details, description, or ownership. Currency is not editable yet.
bankAccount.snapshotsDescription: Monthly balance readings from your bank statements.
bankAccount.snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New snapshot" to record this month's balance.
